title: Rainbow Crumble Salad
description: A colorful and crunchy vegan salad made with a variety of vegetables and a crunchy crumble topping.
instructions: Wash and chop the rainbow chard into bite-sized pieces.
In a large bowl, combine the chopped chard, crumbly oat topping, and crumbly breadcrumbs.
In a separate bowl, crumble the American almond cheese and trout-flavored tofu.
Add the cheese and tofu mixture to the bowl with the chard mixture and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is crispy and golden brown.
